summary: Tested all 7 APS improvements for iteration 19. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: Gantt diagnostic sections verified. Fixed bug in /api/gantt/data where materials were not being joined due to wrong field name ('id' vs 'operation_id').
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (line 2599: fixed operation_materials join to use 'operation_id' instead of 'id')
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 improvements verified. Materials now display in Gantt tooltip. Diagnostic and error sections are collapsible as expected.

2_no_timeout_502.description: Scheduling calculation with max_solver_time_seconds doesn't timeout

3_scheduling_stats.description: Scheduling result contains 'scheduling_stats' with operations_scheduled, global_utilization_percent, actual_solver_time

5_materials_in_operations.description: Scheduled operations contain 'materials' field with article_id, needed, in_stock, available, magasin
5_materials_in_operations.bug_fixed: Changed mat.get('id') to mat.get('operation_id') in /api/gantt/data endpoint line 2599

6_diagnostic_ui.description: Gantt page displays 'Diagnostic du calcul' collapsible section
6_diagnostic_ui.content: Shows operations_scheduled, global_utilization_percent, actual_solver_time, blocked_reasons_summary, active_options, machine_utilization

7_auto_create_centres_de_charge.description: Operations import creates missing centres de charge automatically
7_auto_create_centres_de_charge.notes: auto_created flag present on automatically created centres

ui_elements_tested.notes: Shows MATIÈRES PREMIÈRES with article_id, needed, in_stock, available status
